name: Clooney, George
source_notes:
Birth certificate in hand from Viktor E.

Previously this entry had the same data and the following notes: Grazia Bordoni quotes Carol Adrienne, who wrote to Antonio Capitani in May 2001, "My assistant wrote to the state of Kentucky to obtain a copy of Clooney's birth certificate.  He was born in Lexington, Kentucky as George Timothy Clooney on May 6, 1961 at 2:58 AM."

IMDb has 2.48 am

Sy Scholfield quotes twins' data from news report, "George and Amal Clooney’s Twins' Birth Order Revealed - Find Out Who Is the Oldest!" by Elisa Osegueda, www.etonline.com, 7 July 2017 [http://www.etonline.com/news/221065_george_clooney_amal_clooney_twins_birth_order_revealed/]: "According to birth certificates obtained by ET, Alexander was born at 12:54 p.m., while his younger sister was born at 12:56 p.m." Same data in "George and Amal Clooney step out for dinner date in Italy: The couple welcomed twins Alexander and Ella on 6 June" by Gemma Strong, Hello!, 12 July 2017 [http://www.hellomagazine.com/celebrities/2017071240553/new-parents-george-clooney-amal-clooney-dinner-date-italy/]: "Alexander and Ella ... were born at London's St Mary's Hospital on 6 June; Alexander arrived first, at 12.54pm, followed by his sister Ella at 12.56pm."
categories: Family : Relationship : Cohabitation more than 3 yrs
